response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video, separated into dialogue and performance scenes. Identified song 'Intergalactic Bound' via on-screen text. Used search query '"Intergalactic Bound" Yunosuke and CircusP lyrics' to find the lyrics, which are in English. Constructed JSON.
response.global_summary: The video shows a virtual character, Cecilia Immergreen, interacting with her audience in a staged setting with a burning car prop. She then gives a performance of the song 'Intergalactic Bound'.

scenes.description: Cecilia Immergreen talks to her audience, showing off merchandise, with a burning car prop in the background.
Cecilia Immergreen performs the song 'Intergalactic Bound' on a stage. Song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
C'mon, I feel like there's something about this song
It's like we knew how it'd go all along
So put down your worries and raise your cups
There's nowhere to go but up
Lots of thumbs with a rhythm from New York to Japan
Know you'll never be alone
At first glance we're miles away
But our hearts are connected through these soundwaves

[Chorus]
Nothing but up, up, up! (yeah!)
Cut through the clouds
Nothing but up, up, up! (yeah!)
We're never coming down
Jump! (jump!) Jump! (jump!)
Without a doubt
Nothing but up up up! (yeah!)
Intergalactic bound

[Bridge]
A thousand little voices sing
It's a fiesta from now on
With our playthings always by our side
To help us make this song
Through the dark of the night
I know we will be alright
There's a universe of positivity beyond the sky
There's thousand of the stars
They will keep on burning bright
With this light held between you and I
Nothing but up, up, up (yeah)
Cut through the clouds
Nothing but up, up, up (yeah)
We're never coming down
Jump, jump without a doubt
Nothing but up, up, up (yeah)
Intergalactic bound
